title: Seed ~500 gems: Nagoya + Hakone areas, Tokyo/Osaka hotels
description: Fan out Claude/Codex/Grok workers to author ~520 curated gems as JSONL (Nagoya food/sights/day-trips, Hakone core+orbit, Tokyo/Osaka/Nagoya hotels, corridor connectors), validate, import into data/gems.db, verify search, push-gems.

title: Author Hakone core gem batch 5 JSONL
description: Create the Batch 5 Hakone core gem JSONL at the requested scratchpad path, covering the specified Hakone area slugs with about 75 real places and no hotels or ryokan.
acceptance_criteria: Requested JSONL exists at the exact scratchpad path; every line is valid JSON; all entries use city=hakone; areas are limited to the requested Hakone slugs; entries cover the requested mix and exclude hotels and ryokan; the exact python json.loads validation command succeeds.
close_reason: Wrote 75 Hakone batch-5 JSONL entries to the exact scratchpad path, all parse with the requested json.loads validation command, all use city=hakone, and areas are limited to the requested Hakone core slugs without hotels or ryokan.

title: Author batch 6 Hakone orbit gems JSONL
description: Produce the wider Hakone orbit batch as strict JSONL at the requested scratchpad path, covering verified real places in Odawara, Atami, Yugawara, Gotemba, Mishima, plus up to six Hakone pointer entries.
design: Use official/tourism sources to verify landmark names and broad existence, then write concise spoken-friendly pitches and details.
acceptance_criteria: Scratchpad file exists at the user-specified path; each line is valid JSON matching gem-spec.md fields and allowed city slugs; about 65 entries cover the requested towns and themes with only real, verifiable places; python3 json parse check passes.
close_reason: Completed batch 6 JSONL in requested scratchpad path and validated it parses.

title: Koyuki narrative: 38yo lifelong Japan local, world-traveled, Kansai roots, free helper
description: Rewrite persona narrative: 38 years old, lived in Japan all her life, traveled 25+ countries but loves Japan most, lives in Kobe (Kansai), helps travelers for free from the heart, hands off to account creation + booking partner when booking stage arrives.

title: Rename repo and checkout to vox-local
description: User requested renaming the current voice-local project to vox-local, including the git repo identity, local checkout path, and repo-facing naming/config surfaces that depend on the repo name.
design: Keep the internal Python package directory `src/voice_local` unchanged unless the rename requires import-path churn; update distribution/CLI/service/display names and checkout-path references instead.
acceptance_criteria:
- GitHub repository `lin-labs/voice-local` is renamed to `lin-labs/vox-local` and the local `origin` remote points to the new URL.
- The local checkout directory is renamed from `voice-local` to `vox-local` without losing git history.
- Repo-facing names and paths that depend on the old repo name are updated consistently to `vox-local` where needed, while internal Python module imports remain working.
- Test coverage relevant to the rename passes, and docs/deploy paths no longer point at the old checkout name.
notes: Need to account for Beads bootstrap commit that was created during this session and ensure subsequent commands use the renamed checkout path.
close_reason: Renamed GitHub repo to lin-labs/vox-local, moved the local checkout to /home/blin/Experiments/voice/vox-local, updated repo-facing CLI/service/docs/extension naming, refreshed the venv after the path move, and verified with uv run pytest tests -q plus uv run python -m pytest tests -q.
